articles.title: Bruins to battle Buffalo Sabres in first round of Stanley Cup Playoffs
articles.description:
The Bruins will have a tough test against a Sabres team that has posted a record of 39-9-4 since Dec. 9.

The post Bruins to battle Buffalo Sabres in first round of Stanley Cup Playoffs appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: After budget letdown, hundreds rally for new Jackson Mann community center in Allston
articles.description:
After the mayor's five-year capital plan included $10 million for study into Jackson Mann's future, Councilor Liz Breadon is demanding $65 million “indicate that they're serious about building a community center here.”

articles.title: Willson Contreras leaves game with back tightness as Red Sox fall to Twins 6-0
articles.description:
Red Sox starter Sonny Gray (2-1) gave up five runs on nine hits with a walk and a strikeout over four innings.
